2605.20158.title: Rethinking Visual Attribution for Chest X-ray Reasoning in Large Vision Language Models
2605.20158.paper_summary: Large Vision Language Models (LVLMs) show promise in medical applications, but their inability to faithfully ground responses in visual evidence raises serious concerns about clinical trustworthiness. While visual attribution methods are widely used to explain LVLM predictions, whether these explanations actually reflect the visual evidence underlying the model's decision is largely unverified, since ground-truth annotations for internal model reasoning are typically unavailable. We address this question for chest X-ray (CXR) reasoning by developing a causal evaluation framework that retains only CXR-VQA samples for which the expert-annotated region is verified, via counterfactual editing, to be causally responsible for the model's prediction. Using this framework across 11 attribution methods, six open-source LVLMs, and two output modes (direct answer and step-by-step reasoning), we find that existing attribution methods often fail to identify the evidence used by LVLMs. To address this failure, we propose MedFocus, a concept-based attribution method that localizes clinically meaningful anatomical regions via unbalanced optimal transport and measures their causal effect on model outputs through targeted interventions. MedFocus produces spatial, concept-level, and token-level attributions and substantially outperforms prior methods, taking a step toward more trustworthy attribution for medical LVLMs. Our data and code are available at https://github.com/gzxiong/medfocus/.
2605.20158.paper_summary_zh: 大型視覺語言模型（LVLMs）在醫療應用中顯示出潛力，但它們無法忠實地將回應與視覺證據相結合，這引發了對臨床可信度的嚴重擔憂。雖然視覺歸因方法被廣泛用來解釋LVLM的預測，但這些解釋是否實際反映了模型決策背後的視覺證據在很大程度上尚未得到驗證，因為內部模型推理的真實標註通常無法獲得。我們通過開發一個因果評估框架來解決這一問題，該框架僅保留那些經過專家標註並通過反事實編輯驗證為對模型預測具有因果責任的CXR-VQA樣本。利用這一框架，我們對11種歸因方法、六個開源LVLM和兩種輸出模式（直接回答和逐步推理）進行了研究，發現現有的歸因方法往往無法識別LVLM所使用的證據。為了解決這一失敗，我們提出了MedFocus，一種基於概念的歸因方法，通過不平衡最優運輸定位臨床上有意義的解剖區域，並通過針對性干預測量它們對模型輸出的因果影響。MedFocus生成空間、概念級和標記級的歸因，並顯著超越先前的方法，朝著為醫療LVLM提供更可信的歸因邁出了一步。我們的數據和代碼可在 https://github.com/gzxiong/medfocus/ 獲得。
2605.20158.author: Guangzhi Xiong et.al.
2605.20158.authors: Guangzhi Xiong, Qiao Jin, Sanchit Sinha, Zhiyong Lu, Aidong Zhang
